This is most definitely the best Gorilla Tag fan game I believe I have ever played in my life. Great moderation team, and great community overall. 10/10 I really recommend you play this wonderful game.

The gameplay is honestly not really that enjoyable, there's barely any content and it doesn't have much character. Another thing about this game that basically kills it is the moderators, almost all of them are underage and absolutely power hungry.
